hero.title: Decode your destiny with trusted Bharatiya astrology
hero.description: Personalised guidance for career, marriage, health and wealth from verified astrologers in Hindi & English.

consultation.title: Live astrologers, 24x7 guidance
consultation.description: Connect instantly via chat, voice or video. Verified experts with ratings, language preference, and specialisation filters.

hero.title: Fast Government & Digital Services in Bhayandar East
hero.subtitle: Sarathi Digital Seva Kendra is your trusted local shop for document applications, train tickets, and all everyday digital help.
hero.address: Shop No.14, Rashmi Laxmi, Navghar Road, Bhayandar East, Thane 401105
hero.whatsappText: Hello Sarathi Kendra, I am looking for help with a digital service. Are you open today?

aadhaar.title: 🪪 Aadhaar Services
aadhaar.desc: Reliable assistance with Aadhaar updates, demographic changes, and smart card printing.
aadhaar.docsDesc: Bring your old Aadhaar card, valid ID proof, and address proof.
aadhaar.timeDesc: Updates typically process based on UIDAI timelines.
aadhaar.whatsappText: Hello, I need help with Aadhaar services. What are the requirements?

pan.title: 💳 PAN Card Services
pan.desc: Apply for a new PAN card or request corrections safely and accurately.
pan.docsDesc: Provide your Aadhaar card and a recent passport-sized photograph.
pan.timeDesc: Standard processing times apply as per NSDL/UTIITSL guidelines.
pan.whatsappText: Hello, I need help applying for a PAN card.

voter.title: ✅ Voter ID & Verification
voter.desc: Apply for new Voter IDs, update addresses, and process online Police Clearance forms.
voter.docsDesc: Valid address proof, age proof, and a recent passport-sized photograph.
voter.timeDesc: Application submissions are quick; final approval depends on the department.

certificates.title: 📜 Government Certificates
certificates.desc: Easy application processing for Caste, Income, Domicile, and other state certificates.
certificates.docsDesc: Please provide a valid ration card, any old related certificates, and a photograph.
certificates.timeDesc: Usually processed within a few weeks by local authorities.
certificates.whatsappText: Hello, I need help applying for a certificate.

govcards.title: 🏛️ E-Shram & Ayushman
govcards.desc: Enroll in government welfare schemes like E-Shram and Ayushman Bharat seamlessly.
govcards.docsDesc: Bring your Aadhaar card, ration card, and bank account details.
govcards.timeDesc: Fast enrollment subject to server availability.

banking.title: 💸 Banking & Money Transfer
banking.desc: Secure Aadhaar-enabled cash withdrawals and domestic money transfers.
banking.docsDesc: Please bring your Aadhaar card and linked mobile number.

travel.title: 🚆 Travel & Ticket Booking
travel.desc: Book confirmed train tickets (IRCTC), flights, and bus tickets for your journeys.
travel.docsDesc: Provide accurate passenger details along with a valid government ID proof.
travel.timeDesc: Immediate booking confirmation based on seat availability.

business.title: 📊 GST & Tax Filing
business.desc: Professional assistance with GST registration, MSME Udyam, and Income Tax Returns.
business.docsDesc: You must provide your PAN card, Aadhaar card, and current bank details.
business.timeDesc: Prompt filing with official processing times varying by department.
business.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about GST Registration and ITR filing.

licenses.title: 🏪 Shop Act & Food Licenses
licenses.desc: Get your business registered properly with Gumasta (Shop Act) and FSSAI Food Licenses.
licenses.docsDesc: Bring your Aadhaar, PAN, photo, and shop rent agreement or electricity bill.
licenses.timeDesc: Typically takes a few days for the department to issue the certificate.

passport.title: 🛂 Passport & RTO Services
passport.desc: Apply for fresh passports, renewals, and driving licenses with expert guidance.
passport.docsDesc: Provide your original address proof, educational certificates, and valid ID.
passport.timeDesc: We complete applications promptly; official scheduling varies.

insurance.title: 🛡️ Insurance Renewals
insurance.desc: Protect your family and vehicles with health, life, and motor insurance renewals.
insurance.docsDesc: Provide old policy papers, vehicle RC, and owner ID proof.

education.title: 🎓 Education & Job Forms
education.desc: Get help filling out school/college admission forms, govt jobs, and scholarships.
education.docsDesc: Provide all relevant educational marksheets, photos, and signatures.
education.timeDesc: Forms are completed and submitted in-store.

printing.title: 🖨️ Printing & Stationery
printing.desc: High-quality color/B&W printouts, photocopies, lamination, and daily stationery.
printing.docsDesc: You can bring your files on a Pen Drive or send them directly to us on WhatsApp.
printing.timeDesc: Done on the spot at our center.
printing.whatsappText: Hello, I want to get some documents printed. I am sending the files here.

astrologyBanner.title: Astrology Services
astrologyBanner.subtitle: Looking for cosmic guidance? We also offer free Kundli, daily Panchang, and personalized horoscopes in a dedicated section of our Kendra.

webDev.title: 🌐 Website & Landing Pages
webDev.desc: Professional website development and fast landing page design to help your shop or business get online quickly and attract new customers.
webDev.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about Website Development & Landing Page Design.

googleBiz.title: 📍 Google Maps & Business Profile
googleBiz.desc: Get your shop officially listed and verified on Google Maps so local customers in Bhayandar can easily find your location and hours.
googleBiz.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about getting my shop listed on Google Maps.

socialMedia.title: 📱 WhatsApp Business & Social Media
socialMedia.desc: Setup of WhatsApp Business catalogs, automated replies, and professional Facebook/Instagram pages to connect with your customers directly.
socialMedia.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about WhatsApp Business and Social Media setup.

domainHosting.title: 📧 Domain, Hosting & Business Email
domainHosting.desc: Secure your custom internet address (like yourshop.com), set up reliable web hosting, and create professional business email accounts.
domainHosting.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about Domain, Hosting, or Business Email setup.

seo.title: 🚀 Basic SEO & Online Visibility
seo.desc: Basic Search Engine Optimization (SEO) to help your website rank better when people search for your products or services on Google.
seo.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about SEO and improving my online visibility.

maintenance.title: 🛠️ Website Maintenance & Forms
maintenance.desc: Monthly website updates, security checks, and custom online inquiry forms to easily capture leads from potential customers.
maintenance.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about Website Maintenance and Online Forms.

bizSetup.title: 🏢 Complete Business Setup Support
bizSetup.desc: End-to-end support including logo design, billing setup, and assistance with GST, MSME, Shop Act, and FSSAI registrations.
bizSetup.whatsappText: Hello, I want to inquire about Complete Business Setup Support.
